extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIČ attacked on a mid-race climb, dropped PINOT and NIBALI after multiple accelerations, and opened 32 seconds before 14km remaining.
tactical_patterns: ROGLIČ made 4-6 successive accelerations on climb to finally drop PINOT and NIBALI, not single explosive move.
Groupama-FDJ controlled early breakaway chase despite PINOT being up road, suggesting team ambiguity or communication failure.

rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: multiple accelerations broke PINOT and NIBALI decisively on climb with 14km remaining
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: neutral: chased behind camera motorbike to rejoin ROGLIČ group but couldn't follow final accelerations
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: dropped when ROGLIČ made 4-6 accelerations despite being in front group of four
